hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in *.tf|*.tfvars) timeout 3s terraform fmt -diff=false "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; *.yml|*.yaml) timeout 3s yq -i "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; */Dockerfile|Dockerfile) timeout 3s yq -i "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; git add "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
